steps.label: PANEL · YESTERDAY (finished) — open the date menu, click the previous day
steps.expected: Selecting yesterday shows 1 finished match: MIL 2-1 DOR (minute column blank). Today is empty.

steps.label: PANEL · TOMORROW (upcoming) — click the next day in the calendar
steps.expected: Selecting tomorrow shows 1 upcoming match: PSG vs NAP with its kick-off time (minute column blank). Today is empty.

steps.label: PRE-MATCH — Real Madrid vs FC Barcelona (kick-off in ~25 min)
steps.expected: If reminder switch ON (lead >= 25 min): 'Upcoming match' reminder for Madrid-Barça only. If switch OFF: no notification. Panel today already shows 3 matches: upcoming RMA-FCB, finished BAY 3-2 LIV, upcoming MCI vs INT (+4h).

steps.label: PRE-MATCH again — kick-off now in ~5 min (inside the 10-min watch window)
steps.expected: No notification. Reminder ON: already sent, no refire. Reminder OFF: silent, but this records the PRE baseline so MATCH_START fires next. Panel today still shows the 3 matches.

steps.label: MATCH_START — match begins
steps.expected: Notification: match started (reminder does not re-fire). Panel today now shows 3 matches: live RMA-FCB with its minute, finished BAY 3-2 LIV (3h ago), upcoming MCI vs INT (4h ahead).

steps.label: RED_CARD — Frenkie de Jong (75', FC Barcelona)
SUBSTITUTION — Valverde on, Modrić off (80', Real Madrid)
MATCH_END — final whistle
steps.expected: Notification: match ended. Panel today: Madrid-Barça now finished alongside the other two.
